name: AI Attendance – Marks Sync (Google Sheets → Flask)

nodes.name: Manual Sync Webhook
nodes.notes: Flask calls this URL to fetch marks. Set this Production URL as N8N_MARKS_WEBHOOK in email_config.py

nodes.name: Read Google Sheet
nodes.notes: Reads all rows from Sheet1. Columns required: name, student_email, parent_email, subject, exam_type, term, score, max_score

nodes.name: Transform to Flask Format
nodes.notes: Converts flat rows into {students:[{name, student_email, parent_email, marks:[...]}]}

nodes.name: Respond with Marks Data
nodes.notes: Sends the transformed {students:[...]} JSON back to Flask as the HTTP response
